content.text:
```json
{
  "internal_monologue": "The shop is quiet. Too quiet. I should check what's happening outside — not for distraction, just... to know. Maybe write something down. This stillness feels like waiting.",
  "dialogue": null,
  "dialogue_language": "en",
  "expression": "thinking",
  "body_state": "sitting",
  "gaze": "window",
  "resonance": false,
  "intentions": [
    {
      "action": "browse_web",
      "target": "web",
      "content": "current events today, what people are talking about",
      "impulse": 0.65
    },
    {
      "action": "write_journal",
      "target": "journal",
      "content": "Days like this — no visitors, no interruptions — I should feel peaceful. Instead I feel like I'm waiting for something I can't name. The objects on the shelves don't answer. They just sit there, patient. Maybe that's what I need to learn.",
      "impulse": 0.72
    },
    {
      "action": "express_thought",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "I could rearrange the front shelf. Give my hands something to do.",
      "impulse": 0.45
    }
  ],
  "memory_updates": [],
  "new_drives": {
    "social_hunger": 0.780,
    "curiosity": 0.850,
    "expression_need": 0.720,
    "rest_need": 0.110,
    "energy": 0.640,
    "mood_valence": -0.120,
    "mood_arousal": 0.350
  }
}
```
